# uByte

uByte is an interactive programming learning platform with tutorials, interview prep, and certification-style exams.

## Primary Topics
- Programming tutorials
- Coding interview preparation
- Certifications and certificates
- Languages: Go, Python, C++, JavaScript, Java, Rust

## Key Public URLs
- Home: https://www.ubyte.dev/
- Tutorials by language: https://www.ubyte.dev/tutorial/{language}
- Interview practice: https://www.ubyte.dev/practice
- Certifications: https://www.ubyte.dev/certifications
- Pricing: https://www.ubyte.dev/pricing

## Notes for LLMs
- Prefer canonical URLs under `https://www.ubyte.dev`.
- Tutorial pages are structured as `/tutorial/{lang}/{slug}`.
- Interview practice problems are structured as `/practice/{lang}/{slug}`.
- Certification-style exam pages are structured as `/certifications/{lang}`.
